scripts.dev:clean: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.next', { recursive: true, force: true, maxRetries: 10, retryDelay: 200 })" && WATCHPACK_POLLING=true next dev --webpack
scripts.local: lsof -ti:3000 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.next', { recursive: true, force: true, maxRetries: 10, retryDelay: 200 })" && WATCHPACK_POLLING=true next dev --webpack
scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('.next', { recursive: true, force: true, maxRetries: 10, retryDelay: 200 }); fs.rmSync('tsconfig.tsbuildinfo', { force: true })"
